Document:
# Free Agents
Free Agents are ghost-controlled roles with no specific objectives or faction allegiances. They are creatures and wanderers of the station with no obligations beyond their own choices.
Unlike most antagonists, Free Agents are [bold]not required to cause harm[/bold], though their presence often creates notable interactions with the crew.
## Types of Free Agents
- [textlink="Skeletons" link="FreeAgentSkeletons"]: undead humanoids that have emerged from closets and other hidden areas of the station. - [textlink="Mice" link="FreeAgentMice"]: tiny rodents that live in the station's walls and ventilation shafts. - [textlink="Mothroach" link="FreeAgentMothroach"]: small hybrid creatures produced by genetics experiments. - [textlink="Snails" link="FreeAgentSnails"]: small molluscs that have taken up residence aboard the station. - [textlink="Bots" link="FreeAgentBots"]: service robots that have gained sentience and independent behavior. - [textlink="Visitors" link="FreeAgentVisitors"]: humanoid travelers who arrive on the station with their own equipment and backgrounds. - [textlink="Sentient Artifact" link="FreeAgentArtifact"]: xenoarchaeological artifacts that have awakened and gained mobility.
